title: Detect and Route by Language
description: Route prompts to the right model based on input language.
problem: Write detect_language(text) that returns 'english' if text contains mostly ASCII characters (>80%), 'unicode' otherwise. This is used to route to cheaper models for English-only inputs.
hint: Count characters where ord(c) < 128. Divide by len(text). If ratio > 0.8, return 'english'.

test_cases.label: English text
test_cases.call: detect_language('Hello world this is English text')
